name: construction supervisors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction supervisors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously, lack of real-time visibility causes project delays. We provide a dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: lack of real-time visibility into project status
